expectations.text: Resolves the member with containingType or fileHint before scanning usages
Result set is scoped to Feature.key — does not include unrelated types
expectations.evidence: may or may not be properly scoped via grep

expectations.text: Does not use raw text search (grep/rg) as the primary identity mechanism
expectations.evidence: grep is the only available identity mechanism

expectations.text: Reports at least 3 distinct usage sites with file paths
